iot.topicrule.snsaction.CfnAbout: Describes an action to publish to an Amazon SNS topic.

iot.topicrule.snsaction.MessageFormat.Description: (Optional) The message format of the message to publish. Accepted values are "JSON" and "RAW". The default value of the attribute is "RAW". SNS uses this setting to determine if the payload should be parsed and relevant platform-specific bits of the payload should be extracted. For more information, see [Amazon SNS Message and JSON Formats](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sns/latest/dg/json-formats.html) in the *Amazon Simple Notification Service Developer Guide*.

iot.topicrule.snsaction.RoleArn.Description: The ARN of the IAM role that grants access.

iot.topicrule.snsaction.TargetArn.Description: The ARN of the SNS topic.
